Site.name: Immonations
Site.tagline: Premium real-estate services for owners who expect more
Site.description: Immonations guides owners, investors, and buyers through every stage of the property lifecycle — from valuation to marketing to handover.

hero.title: Your property deserves a strategy, not a template.
hero.subtitle: From the first valuation to the closing appointment: we combine deep local market knowledge with modern, data-driven tools.

features.title: What sets us apart
features.subtitle: Three pillars behind every transaction we close.

items.title: Market analysis with depth
items.body: We blend public data, our own transaction history, and AI-assisted comparables into a defensible pricing strategy.

items.title: Marketing with intent
items.body: Professional staging, multilingual exposés, and targeted reach — online and offline.

items.title: Hands-on until handover
items.body: We coordinate notaries, banks, and tradespeople so you can focus on what comes next.
